name: Shadow Amulet
description:
Active: Fade

Grants invisibility to you or a target allied hero for %fade_duration%s. Movement speed during the invisibility is reduced by %movement_speed_reduction%%%.
notes: Takes %fade_time%s of the %fade_duration%s for the hero to fully fade into invisibility.
lore: A small talisman that clouds the senses of one's enemies when held perfectly still.
